channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Live: ABC News Live
item.description: Continuous coverage of breaking news and live events.

item.title: Shippers face 'worst case scenario' as U.S. and Iran intensify attacks
item.description: With U.S.-Iran hostilities escalating 140 days into the war, an analyst says no one is willing to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Maps show wildfire smoke forecast and air quality alerts across parts of the U.S.
item.description: Thick smoke from large wildfires in Canada and Minnesota is blanketing much of the Midwest and East Coast this week.

item.title: Watch: President Trump addresses the nation on election claims
item.description: Ahead of the midterms, Trump gave a prime-time speech on election security after years of making false claims about the 2020 election.
